data.reasoningText:
The user is asking about .NET MAUI Shell navigation with query parameters and IQueryAttributable. They want to see two approaches for passing data to a navigation target page - one with a string parameter (product ID) and one with a full object. They want to use IQueryAttributable on the ViewModel.
